titleStmt.title: SII 5.301: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 301. (A.R. No. 13 of 1894). ON THE INSIDE OF THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasi śrī . pūtalavaṉit Ai metaka viḷaṅka mantaramārviṉi lintiraiyiruppa puyavaraitaḻuvi vayamakaḷ kaḷippa mayalaṟu ciṟappiṉ māmuṉi terinta viyalicaināṭaka meḻilpeṟa vaḷara viñciṉaṅ kūṟa matakkaḷiṟu naṭātti veñciṉa veṅkai villuṭa ṉoḷippa tikkaṭippaṭu
ttu cakkarañ cellap pauva māṉilam pāttivar potuvaṟat teyva meruviṟ ceyal viḷaiyāṭa voṉṟupurineñcat tiruvarukaip piṟappiṉ muṉṉūl mārpiṉ nāṉmaṟaiyāḷar mākavicumpiṉ vāṉavark kamaitta yākaveḻvi yiṭantoṟu miyala Aimpulaṉkaṭkku marumaicā
laṟuvakaic cemporuṭ camaiyañ ciruṭaṉ parava Eḻupoḻil kavitta muḻumatik kavitai tirunilavu corinta virunilavaraippiṉ veṅkali kaṭintu ceṅkola naṭippa viṇporuñcikara mātiraveṇkoṭ ṭeṇperuṅ kaḷiṟumicai makaḷeṟa voṉpatu kaṇṭat tuyarpulaventa raṉ
puṭaṉ vaṇaṅki yaruntiṟai kāṭṭi maṇitaṭamuṭime laṭimalar cūṭa maṇimuṭi cūṭi vaḷaṅkeḻukavari ceracempiyar tiraṇṭarukacaippa viraciṅkātaṉa merunāppaṭ kaṭavuḷmiṉ(ṉ) kaṟputtikaḻa vuṭaṉmuṭi cūṭi yulakam poṟṟac cerumalitāṉaip pārpura ventar kaṭakattoḷu mākamum piriyā voṭarineṭu
ṅkaṇoṇṭoṭi makaḷir tilatan talameṟ cevaṭi vaikku mulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmatimatikkulam viḷakkiya komutaṟ koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakra vattikaḷ śrīkulaśekharade varkku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu nāḷ muppattaiñciṉāl maturotayavaḷa
nāṭṭu māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturaik koyiṟp paḷḷiyaṟaikkūṭattup paḷḷippiṭam maḻavarāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu maḻavarāyar svāmi kaḷ celvattiruvārur dakṣṇa koḷakimaṭattu Ācāriyaśiṣya ril taṟpuruṣaśi var ceyyattiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Ivvācāriyar māṭakku
ḷakkiḻ maturait tiruñāṉacampantaṉ maṭattukkup pākaṉūrkkūṟṟattuc coḻakulāntakaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu śrīvallavaṉkaṭṭaḷaiyilum parākra mapāṇṭiyaṉkaṭṭaḷaiyilun tamperāl Aiyaṉ maḻavarāyar vilaikoṇṭu kuṭutta Inta nilamum parākra mapāṇṭiyaṉkaṭṭaḷaik kiḻkūṟ
ṟil yajña muttiyāṇṭāṉ paṟṟāy Aiyaṉ maḻavarāyarkkuk kāṇiyāy varakkuṭutta nila mum Uṭpaṭa Ivvūr kaṭamaiyiṟukkuṅ kolāl velinilam Iraṇṭāvatu mutal kārāṇmai miyāṭciyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamu māk(k)kalamun taṭippatakkumpāṭikāvalun taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavā
rācciyum pāṭṭamum vikkirakappeṟum maṟṟum ṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyaṉa maḻavarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ivūr svāmi kaḷ celvattiruvārūr dakṣṇa koḷakimaṭattu ṉmaṭamāya
māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturait tirumaṭattukkup pākaṉūrkkūṟṟattuc coḻakulāntakaccaturvedi maṅkalattu civallavaṉ kaṭṭaḷaiyilum parākkiramapāṇṭiyaṉ kaṭṭaḷaiyilun tam perāl Aiyaṉ maḻavarāyar vilaikoṇṭu kuṭutta nilamum parākkiramapāṇṭiyaṉkaṭṭa
ḷaik kiḻkūṟṟil yajña murtti Aiyaṉmaḻavarāyarkku Ivarkkuk kuṭutta nilamum Uṭpaṭa Ivvūr kaṭamaiyiṟukkuṅ kolāl nilam veliyum Ivvāṇṭu mutal kārāṇmai miyāṭciyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamu mākkalamun taṭippatakkum pāṭikāvalu
n taruva pañcupili cantu ṟum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭa maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu variyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum nam n taraccoṉṉom kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi candrāditya vaṟ celvatākak kalliluñ
cem ṭivittu tiruvāymoḻintaru llināṭṭut taṭaṅkaṇṇicciṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ coṟaṉ Uyyaniṉṟāṭuvāṉāṉa kurukulattarayaṉ Eḻuttu ... Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattuk kiḻkūṟṟu veṭciyūrāṉa mummuṭicoḻanallūr veṭṭaṉuṭaiyāṉ
cevvirukkaināṭṭuc llūr Araiyaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . svasti śrī. tribhu vaṉaccakra vatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Aiyaṉ maḻavarāyar svāmi kaḷ celvattiruvārūr dakṣṇa koḷakimaṭattu Ācāriyar
ciṣya ril taṟpuruṣaṟku Ivvāṇṭumāṭakkuḷakkiḻ matu ntaṉmaṭattukku pākaṉūrkkūṟṟattuc coḻakulāntakaccaruppetimaṅkalattu śrīvallavaṉkaṭṭaḷaiyilum parākra mapāṇṭiyaṉkaṭṭaḷaiyilum tam perāla Aiyaṉ maḻavarāyar kuṭutta nilamum parākra mapāṇṭiyaṉka
ṭṭaḷaik kiḻkūṟṟil murttiyāṇṭāṉ paṟṟāy Aiyaṉ maḻavarāyarkkuk kāṇiyāy Ivar kuṭutta nilamum Uṭpaṭa Ivvūr kaṭamaiiṟukkuṅ kolāl velinilam Iraṇṭāvatu mutal kārāṇmaimiyāṭciyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamumākkalamun taṭippatakkum pā taruvatāṉa Accuṅ kāriyavārācciyum
veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭavum Uṭpaṭa maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyaṉ maḻavarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ivar svāmi kaḷ celvattiruvārūr dakṣṇa koḷakimaṭattu Ācāriyar maṭamāṉa māṭak maturait tiruñāṉacampantaṉmaṭattu
p pākaṉūrkūṟṟa coḻakulāntakaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu śrīvallavaṉkaṭṭaḷaiyi kra mapāṇṭiyaṉkaṭṭaḷaiyilun tam perāl Aiyaṉ maḻavarāyar vilaikoṇṭu kuṭutta nilamum parākra mapāṇṭiyaṉkaṭṭaḷaik kiḻkūṟṟil yajña murttiyāṇṭāṉ paṟṟāy Aiyaṉ maḻa rkkuk kāṇiyāṭci varakkuṭutta nilamum Uṭpa
ṭaivvūr kaṭamaikkolāl nilam veliyum Ivvāṇṭumutal kārāṇmai miyāṭciyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamu mākkalamun taṭippatakkum pāṭikāvalum taruvatāṉa Accuṅ kāriyaārācciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Uṭpaṭṭa kaṭa
lār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyuṅ keḻviyun taraccoṉṉom Ippaṭi candrāditya vaṟ celvatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭuvittukkoḷka Ivai vaṭatalaiccempināṭṭu nallūrkkuṟicci Ulakamuṇṭāṉ tevaṉāṉa cempiyataraya ṉeḻuttu ... yāṇṭu 2 vatu nāḷ [100 10 6] Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattu vaṭapāmpāṟṟuttaṇṇi
raṇṭakkuṭayāṉ kkuṭaiyāṉ tevaparā muva Eḻuttu ... Ivai karuṅkuṭi nāṭṭu kā kirttivicālaiyanallūr nakkaṉ Iraṭṭaiyāṉa toṇṭaimāṉeḻuttu ... Antarāyamumuṭpaṭa
ṭa maṭappuṟa varāyasvāmi kaḷ celvattiruvārur dakṣṇa koḷakimaṭattu Ācāriyar māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturait tiru ñāṉacampantaṉmaṭattukku Iraṇṭāvatu mutal kārāṇmai miyāṭciyum Antarāyamum viṉiyoka lamun taṭippatakkum pāṭikāvalum kāriyavārā
cciyum kirakappeṟum maṟṟum E paṭṭaṉavum Uṭ Iṟaiyiliyāka Ivar śiṣya ril taṟpuruṣaśi varperāl maḻavarāyar pākaṉūrkkūṟṟattu(ttu)c coḻakulāntakaccatu� tu śrīvallavaṉkaṭṭaḷaiyilum parākkiramapāṇṭiyaṉ
kaṭṭa m parākkiramapāṇ kūṟṟil yajña murtti paṟṟāy maḻavarāyarkku Aruḷāy Ivar kuṭuttanilamum Uṭpaṭa Ivvūr kaṭamai Iṟukkuṅ kolāl nilam 1 li nilam veliyum Ivvāṇ miyāṭciyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamu mākkala
mun taṭippatakkum pāṭika kāriyavārācciyum m pañcupili cantu ṟum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavu puṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭamaikku Ivai puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam ve rāṉa Iravikulamāṇikkanallūrkkoṉāṉa jaṭātara
ṉāṉa varitiṇaikkaḷanāyakam ṭuviṟkū parāntakanallūr kaṭṭakuṟicciyuṭai nārāyaṇaṉāṉa jīṉattaraiya ṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvaritiṇaikka ttu vaṭapāmpāṟṟu taniyūr moḻitevanallūr
tiṇaikkaḷanāyakka vari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam ta kāvaṉūrkkiḻavaṉ perumāḷā
ṉa makatarāya ṉeḻuttu [....ivaip]puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam miḻalaikkūṟṟattu vaṭapāmpāṟṟu vaikuntanallūr ciṟuvampūruṭaiyān Āḷuṭaiyāṉ Aḻakaṉāṉa mātavarāya ṉeḻuttu ... Ivai puravaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam miḻalaikkūṟṟattu vaṭapāmpāṟṟut ta ṇṭakkuṭiyāṉa taraṇi
viccātiranallūr Aṇṭakkuṭaiyāṉ tevapirāṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaṉāṉa kurukularāya ṉeḻuttu . Ivai karuṅkuṭināṭṭu kiṇeṭṭurāṉa kirttivicālaiyanallūr nakkaṉ Iraṭṭaiyāṉa toṇṭaimā ṉeḻuttu ... Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattuk kiḻkūṟṟu taccaṉūruṭaiyāṉ Aru cevakattevaṉāṉa vā
ṇādhi rāja ṉeḻuttu ... Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭuviṟkūṟṟup pullūrkkuṭip poṉpaṟṟiyuṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa muṉaiyataraya ṉeḻuttu ... Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattuk kiḻkūṟṟuceyyāṉaḻa parākra mapāṇṭiyanallūrp poṉpaṟṟiyuṭaiyāṉ tiruppūṇṭiuṭaiyāṉ tiruvaraṅkatevaṉā
ṉa kāṅkeyarāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭuviṟkūṟṟut tuñcaṉūruṭaiyāṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaṉ ciṅkappirāṉāṉa vicaiyarāya ṉeḻuttu ... Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭuviṟkūṟṟup paravilimaṅkalattup pu laiyūruṭaiyāṉ parañcoticaṉmaṉāṉa cetirāja ṉeḻuttu ... Ivai vaṭatalaiccempi
nāṭṭu �ṉa civallavaṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaṉāṉa kāliṅkarāja ṉeḻuttu Ivai veṇpaikkuṭināṭṭuk kāvaṉūr Arayaṉ kaṅkaikoṇṭāṉāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyavāṇādhi rāja ṉeḻuttu ... Ivai karuṅkuṭināṭṭuk kiṇeṭṭūrāṉa kirttivicālayanallūr taṉmapālaaḻakaṉāṉa kaḷa
ṭṭuk kāvaṉūr Arayaṉ perumāḷ naṭuviṟkūṟṟup pullūrkkāṭipperu piram]ādhi rājaneḻuttu ... Ivai puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam miḻalai
paḻantiparāyaṉeḻuttu ... Ivai puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷa nāyakammiḻalaikkūṟṟattu
svasti śrī koccaṭaiyavarmma rāṉa tribhuva ttikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 vatu tulānāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu ṣaṣṭi yum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mragaśirṣa ttunāḷ pākaṉūṟkūṟṟattu brahmade yam śrīcoḷāntakaccatu� maṇṭapattilē ma hājanamum bha ṭṭa
�hakarum kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyirukka Uṭaiyār maḻavarāyar svāmi kaḷ celvattiruvāruṟ dakṣi ṇakoḷakimaṭattu Ācāriyar śiṣyari ltta yoga ṅ kuṭuttaparicāvatu In yar māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturait tiruñāṉacampantaṉ tirumaṭattu kolāl Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa nilam kha
vvāṇṭu mutal taṭikkuṟuṇiyum Eppeṟpaṭṭa sabhā viṉiyokamun taviraveṇumeṉṟu taṟpurṣa civar Apekṣikka nilam velikkum Iv ttavaṟ taṭikkuṟuṇiyum sabhā viniyokamum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum tavirntamaikku vadi maṅkalattu ma hāsabhaiyo
Ivai nārāyaṇaṉ vāsudevabha ṭṭaṉ poṉṉampalanampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai śrīvāsude vaṉ sū riyadevabha ṭṭaṉ poṟkoyil nam ṭṭapocaṉ cakra pāṇibha ṭṭaṉāṉa Uttamanampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku ruvaraṅkappiccaṉ Eḻuttu ... Ippaṭikku
pūṇṭi colaippirāṉ bha ṭṭasomayāji Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikkuivai ṉ Eḻuttu ... Ippaṭikku tiṭṭai bha ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Āliruñcolai nārāyaṇabha ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Ippaṭikku Ivai kāṭṭukkuṟi comayāji bha ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . yāji so
Digital edition of SII 5.301 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
